title: Water Bottle, 1L Sports Water Bottle with Straw, Time Markings, Tritan BPA free, Leakproof Drinks Bottle for School, Cycling, Running (1 Bottle)
features: Hydration Motivation: Never lose track again! Clear time markings and measurement lines help you schedule your intake, ensuring you meet your daily water goals for optimal health, fitness, and wellness
Safe & Reusable Material: Made from premium, BPA-free Tritan copolyester, this sports water bottle is entirely toxin-free. It’s a safe, healthy alternative to single-use plastic bottles
Easy & Convenient Drinking: The one-handed flip-open cap with a secure lock features a silicone straw for a smooth, non-turbulent flow. Drink easily and freely

Wide Mouth & Leak-Proof Design: The wide opening makes adding ice cubes, fruit infusions, or cleaning a breeze. Coupled with the 100% leak-proof safety lock, you can confidently toss it in your gym bag or backpack

Built for an Active Life: Complete with a comfortable wrist strap and a sleek, reflective frosted shell, the motivational water bottle is your ideal partner for the gym, running, hiking, cycling, camping, or a busy day at the office

The Perfect Gift: Available in a vibrant array of colors and in 1L size, it makes a thoughtful and practical gift for any occasion—Mother’s Day, Father’s Day, Christmas, birthdays, or as a wellness gift for a friend or yourself
